description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages venv-setup, type-check, lint, test, end-to-end-tests, post, and deploy. In the venv-setup stage define prepare-venv-pinned (before_script runs `uv venv`, `uv pip sync requirements/requirements.txt`, `uv cache prune --ci`; script runs `uv pip list`; artifacts .venv) and prepare-venv-unpinned (before_script runs `uv venv`, `uv sync --all-extras`, `uv cache prune --ci`; script runs `uv tree`; artifacts .venv and uv.lock). In the test stage add unit-tests-python311, unit-tests-python312, unit-tests-python313 (each extends .prepare-venv-pinned and .unit-tests, installs postgresql and sudo, creates testeruser, runs pytest via `.venv/bin/python -m pytest -n 2 --junitxml=report.xml`, and uploads coverage via .tests-coverage) and their unpinned counterparts (allow_failure, extend .prepare-venv-unpinned) using the uv python3.11/3.12/3.13 images, plus a coverity-scan job that installs curl and python3-pip, downloads the Coverity tool, runs cov-configure and cov-build, archives the results and uploads them, with manual and tag rules. In the lint stage add lint-pinned, lint-unpinned, format-pinned, and format-unpinned jobs extending the appropriate .venv templates and executing `ruff check` or `ruff format --check --diff`; in the type-check stage add type-check-pinned and type-check-unpinned running `mypy buildgrid`. In the post stage add coverage (install `coverage[toml]==7.4.1`, combine, html, report, xml, sed, artifacts and coverage report), documentation and documentation-unpinned (install graphviz, run `./dev-scripts/docs`, artifacts), and pages (collect coverage and documentation into public/ and publish on master). In the deploy stage add latest-docker-image (docker login, build, push on master), release-docker-image (docker login, build, push on tag), release-pypi (uv tool install twine, uv build, twine upload), release-gitlab (release-cli creating a GitLab release with PyPI link), and e2e (docker-in-docker setup, pull and run the e2e image) jobs, using caches $UV_CACHE_DIR and $PIP_CACHE_DIR and variables such as LARGE_RUNNER_TAG, PIP_CACHE_DIR, UV_CACHE_DIR, UV_LINK_MODE.
